query: SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 GROUP BY tier ORDER BY cnt DESC; SELECT titleRelevance, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 GROUP BY titleRelevance ORDER BY cnt DESC; SELECT score, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 GROUP BY score ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 15; SELECT id, firstName, lastName, title, company, email, score, tier, titleRelevance, nameCheckStatus FROM campaignContacts WHERE campaignId = 1 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10;
